title: periballia minuta subsp. australis
intro: Periballia minuta subsp. australis is a subspecies of the Periballia minuta plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of succulent plant native to Australia, known for its small, rounded leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Periballia minuta subsp. australis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments to utilize its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations.
